shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully-balanced, ?duck protein-containing all natural canned dog food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Duck Adult Dog Canned Food , fully-balanced, duck protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
